steps.explanation: The problem states the length is 72 times the width w, so length = 72w. Area = length × width = (72w)(w), which matches the given function.
In the expression y = (72w)(w), the two factors are the two dimensions: w is the width and 72w is the length.

• A: "The length of the rectangle, in feet" — 72w = 72 times the width, which is exactly the length. That matches choice A — A is correct.
  • B: "The area of the rectangle" — the area is y, the entire product (72w)(w), not just one factor. Eliminated.
  • C: "The difference between length and width" — that would be 72w - w = 71w, not 72w. Eliminated.
  • D: "The width of the rectangle" — the width is w, not 72w. Eliminated.
